# Lunaris Trade-offs

Lunaris sacrifices peak efficiency for simpler manufacturing:
- 26% target vs. Solaris's 32%
- Single-junction cell (no silicon bottom layer)
- Lower capital cost per MW of production line
- Faster time-to-market: pilot production starts 2025

Lunaris does not publish independent outdoor-degradation data, whereas Solaris
is pursuing formal IEC 61215 certification in 2026.

Budget: USD 45M over two years.
